_comment: SAMPLE credential-free fixtures for the PropFuel connector — a CONFIG-DRIVEN REST connector (its BaseURL comes from CompanyIntegration.Configuration/credential, so mock mode runs in clean ORIGIN mode: no proxy, no TLS). This file is the SINGLE canonical fixtures manifest consumed by BOTH the offline tiers (mj-test-runner t5MockHttp / t6Sqlite — point MJ_CONNECTORS_REGISTRY at packages/Integration/connectors/test/fixtures) AND the real-engine connector-e2e harness (connector-e2e-harness.mjs via connector-e2e-adapters.buildMock). Shape matches mj-test-runner src/tiers/fixtures.ts. Routes mirror the connector's real endpoints: GET {BaseURL}/contacts?limit&offset&updated_since etc.

DeltaPasses._comment: Delta over Contacts: c1 stays, c2 is UPDATED (name change), c3 is DELETED (dropped from the feed AND reported via ExpectedDeletes), c4 is CREATED. Re-serving /contacts with the new state lets the real engine compute create/update/delete on the next sync.
